title: Blackbeard Ambushes Law
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Killer, Edison, Unknown person #8, Garp, Law as The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.
scene: The Straw Hats reach Egghead, meet Bonney, and discover Vegapunk’s impossible future island while Law is drawn into Blackbeard’s ambush.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: A nearby island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: G-14 NAVAL Base

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Be good boys and girls now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's medicine time!!

dialogue.speaker: Killer
dialogue.text: Navy HQ captain Tashigi

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'm only drinking this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: 'Cause Tashigi-San said so!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's yucky!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Blergh!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've all Shrunk quite a lot, haven't we?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Absolutely! I hardly recognize you, Mocha!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Tashigill~! Have you got a sec?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's that pest, Helmetpo,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Can't you do something about him?

dialogue.speaker: Edison
dialogue.text: G-14 commander vice Admiral DOLL

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You know I can't.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: His best friend's life is on the line,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And I'm worried about Captain Koby too, he's our junior as a marine after all...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Please, you have to listen. I'm begging you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We're all on the same side, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: navy ho lit. CMDR. (sword) HelMEPPO

dialogue.speaker: Edison
dialogue.text: navy HD commander (sword) HIBARI

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I second this, y'hear?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I owe Koby- Senpa!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You hafta come with us to pirate Island, Prince!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Please, Prince, We Need You!!

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: pirate Island? That's Emperor Blackbeard's home turf!!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: navy ho rear Admiral (sword) Prince Grus

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll be swarmed by pirates if we stick our noses into that beehive!

dialogue.speaker: Avalo Pizarro
dialogue.text: That's why it's called Hachinosu!

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: egghead's so close to us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Why can't we deploy a scraphim?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Are you crazy?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Both of you calm down!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At the moment, we can't get a hold of Drake either!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're in no position to act right now!!! is that clear?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Luffy's group

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How can you not know who I am?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm part of the worst generation, just like you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were both on Saboody two years ago!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Oh!! You're part of it too?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't forget, we're enemies!! And the name's Bonney!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Still.... thanks for saving my bacon back there.

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: Don't sweat it, Bogey!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ahh!! It's so cold!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Are you to seriously an emperor?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's the deal with your wanted poster anyway?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I thought your hair was white now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They made quite a stir about it in the papers, you know?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, that's just how I look when I'm totally free!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What's that supposed to mean...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, aren't you worried about the rest of your crew?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: They'll figure it out!! Shishish!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't believe you've got the knight of the sea with you too...

summary: This part advances the Egghead Opening through 54 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
